description: Partially update a community member record. Any subset of `role`/`roleRkey`, `kind`, `tags`, and `attributes` may be supplied. Requires `community.member.write` permission on the target community.

main.description: Rewrite the member record with a merge of the provided fields. Fields not supplied are preserved. Pass `null` for `kind`, `tags`, or `attributes` to clear them.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing required fields or no updatable field supplied.

errors.name: RoleNotFound
errors.description: Supplied roleRkey does not correspond to a role record in the community.

errors.name: NotMember
errors.description: Target DID is not a member of this community.

memberDid.description: The DID of the member to update.

role.description: Optional authorization role name (e.g. 'moderator', 'member'). Mutually exclusive with `roleRkey` — prefer roleRkey for custom roles.

roleRkey.description: Optional: rkey of a net.openfederation.community.role record. Replaces any existing role/roleRkey.

kind.description: Optional semantic type (e.g. 'player', 'staff'). Pass an empty string or null to clear.

tags.description: Optional tags. Pass an empty array to clear.

attributes.description: Optional opaque JSON object. Stored verbatim. Pass null to clear.

role.description: Resolved role name after update (for backwards compat with updateMemberRole clients).
